headlines.title: King Charles reveals his personal tax bill. Spoiler alert: He’s very rich.
headlines.summary: The first-ever tax disclosure by a British monarch was partly intended to contain the damage from revelations about the finances of the king’s disgraced brother, Andrew.

headlines.title: Rubio’s new job? Selling Trump’s Iran deal to a worried Gulf.
headlines.summary: Secretary of State Marco Rubio met with Arab Gulf leaders to reassure them that U.S. isn’t cutting them out of negotiations with Tehran.

headlines.title: Migrants not entitled to apply for asylum while standing on Mexico side of border, Supreme Court rules
headlines.summary: The 6-3 decision clears the way for the Trump administration to resume allowing federal agents at the border to turn back asylum seekers before they enter.

headlines.title: Israel deliberately targeted Palestinian children in Gaza, U.N. commission says
headlines.summary: The Israeli Foreign Ministry called the findings a “libelous sham.”

headlines.title: Hegseth thwarted internal efforts to extend key Army general’s career
headlines.summary: Gen. Christopher Donahue, seen as a top warfighter, is the latest apparent casualty in a purge of senior military leaders by the Trump administration.

headlines.title: Who will control Africa’s AI infrastructure and at what cost
headlines.summary: Data centres and AI systems are expanding across Africa, bringing new pressure on energy and resources.

headlines.title: Israel attacks Lebanon as Netanyahu says troops ‘not going to withdraw’
headlines.summary: Israeli leader says military to stay in occupied areas of southern Lebanon 'as long as necessary', despite US-Iran deal.

headlines.title: Rescuers race to find survivors as death toll in Venezuela quakes hits 235
headlines.summary: Residents are trapped beneath rubble of collapsed buildings after two major quakes hit Venezuela, killing at least 235.

headlines.title: Economic losses mount as Venezuela earthquake death toll grows
headlines.summary: Initial forecasts suggest damage could cost as much as 7 percent of the South American nation's GDP.

headlines.title: UN agency pauses Hormuz ship evacuation initiative after vessel attacked
headlines.summary: Iran warns vessels to use only Tehran-approved routes as IMO halts Hormuz evacuation after ship struck.

headlines.title: What made the deadly Venezuelan earthquakes different
headlines.summary: It appears the two big earthquakes in Venezuela that occurred in rapid succession may have involved two separate fault lines. Several faults intersect in this tectonically complex region.

headlines.title: Photos: See Venezuela destruction after earthquakes
headlines.summary: The earthquakes were Venezuela's largest in over a century.

headlines.title: Judge blocks Postal Service proposal to restrict mail-in voting under Trump's order
headlines.summary: A judge has blocked the U.S. Postal Service's proposals responding to President Trump's order, including not delivering ballots in states that don't turn over voter lists to the federal government.

headlines.title: The Supreme Court says the U.S. can turn away asylum seekers at the border
headlines.summary: By a 6-3 vote, the high court ruled that federal law allows the government to stop asylum seekers from physically setting foot in the United States, effectively keeping them from applying for asylum.

headlines.title: Trump can begin deportations of Syrian, Haitian TPS holders, Supreme Court says
headlines.summary: Writing for the court majority, Justice Samuel Alito that under the TPS law, the president has unreviewable authority to end the program, without intervention from the courts.

headlines.title: Wang Yi highlights Austria's role in China-Europe links
headlines.summary: China's Foreign Minister has called on Austria to continue playing a constructive role in China-European Union ties, saying the two sides should regard each other as partners rather than rivals, and that Europe should view China's development as an opportunity, not a challenge.

headlines.title: Australian wool sector rides evolving market trends
headlines.summary: Australia's pillar wool sector is reaping the rewards from record-high prices as it rides on consumption upgrades and other strengths in its biggest market, China, according to latest figures.

headlines.title: White paper charts path for governance reform
headlines.summary: International affairs experts view China's newly released white paper as a significant and timely contribution to discussions on reforming the global governance system amid mounting challenges such as geopolitical tensions, economic fragmentation and development deficits.

headlines.title: Rescue underway after deadly quakes hit Venezuela
headlines.summary: Venezuela's health ministry raised the death toll to at least 235 on Thursday evening after two powerful earthquakes struck the country a day earlier.

headlines.title: Kenya ruling party lauds CPC development vision
headlines.summary: As the Communist Party of China marks its 105th anniversary on July 1, Hassan Omar, secretary-general of Kenya's ruling party United Democratic Alliance, hailed the CPC's longtime governance as a testament to strong organization, ideological clarity and people-centered philosophy, saying its experience offers valuable lessons for political parties across Africa.

headlines.title: Emergency was direct assault on the Constitution: PM
headlines.summary: PM Modi reflects on the Emergency as a dark chapter in Indian democracy, reaffirming commitment to constitutional values and civil liberties.

headlines.title: Punjab CM Bhagwant Mann says ‘mask’ used to create fake video
headlines.summary: Punjab Chief Minister Bhagwant Mann denies involvement in a controversial video, alleging a blackmailer used a mask to mislead viewers.

headlines.title: Congress flags ‘systemic’ exam failures, launches nationwide student outreach
headlines.summary: Congress initiates 'Chhatron Ki Goonj' campaign to address systemic exam failures, paper leaks, and education issues nationwide.

headlines.title: Opposition seeks rollback of new FCRA Rules, flags ‘overreach’ and impact on civil society
headlines.summary: Opposition leaders criticize new FCRA rules, claiming they threaten NGO independence and impose excessive government oversight on civil society.

headlines.title: In blockaded part of Manipur, an LPG cylinder now sells for ₹5,000
headlines.summary: Economic blockade in Manipur's Kangpokpi district causes soaring prices of essentials and disrupts transportation amid rising ethnic tensions.

headlines.title: US moves ahead with $700 million jet engine sale to Turkey despite lawmaker concerns
headlines.summary: Reuters: US moves ahead with $700 million jet engine sale to Turkey despite lawmaker concerns.

headlines.title: Samsung Group to unveil $648 bln South Korea investments, including for chip plants, report says
headlines.summary: Reuters: Samsung Group to unveil $648 bln South Korea investments, including for chip plants, report says.

headlines.title: King Charles will not live at Buckingham Palace after refit, officials say
headlines.summary: Reuters: King Charles will not live at Buckingham Palace after refit, officials say.

headlines.title: International aid heads to Venezuela after deadly earthquake
headlines.summary: Reuters: International aid heads to Venezuela after deadly earthquake.

headlines.title: Iran fired on cargo ship, US officials tell Reuters
headlines.summary: Reuters: Iran fired on cargo ship, US officials tell Reuters.

markets.label: Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS

hackerNews.title: AI children's books, body horror edition
hackerNews.summary: lcamtuf.substack.com: AI children's books, body horror edition.

hackerNews.title: Om Malik has died
hackerNews.summary: Om Malik passed away on June 24, 2026, at Stanford Hospital after a long health journey with his heart. He was surrounded by family and friends. We invite you to share your remembrances of Om in th…

hackerNews.title: Apple to skip high-end M6 Mac chips in favor of AI-focused M7 line
hackerNews.summary: bloomberg.com: Apple to skip high-end M6 Mac chips in favor of AI-focused M7 line.

hackerNews.title: An entire Herculaneum scroll has been read for the first time
hackerNews.summary: PHerc. 1667, sealed since the eruption of Vesuvius in 79 AD, has been virtually unwrapped and read from beginning to end — without ever being opened.

hackerNews.title: Framework's 10G Ethernet module exposes USB-C's complexity
The 'papers, please' era of the internet will decimate your privacy
hackerNews.summary: Americans, be warned: Age verification is identity verification.

hackerNews.title: A data race that doesn't compile
hackerNews.summary: How I taught Rust’s type system to refuse my own parallel-Redux data races, with one false start and one mind-shift.

hackerNews.title: The Garbage Collection Handbook: The Art of Automatic Memory Management (2nd Ed) (2023)
Un-0: Generating Images with Coupled Oscillators
hackerNews.summary: We built Un-0, an image generator powered by a simulated system of coupled oscillators, an example of an emerging physical computing substrate. On ImageNet 64×64 it reaches FID 6.74, matching the quality of leading conventional image generation methods when they were first published. Weights, training, and ablation code are all open.

hackerNews.title: IBM debuts sub-1 nanometer chip technology
hackerNews.summary: IBM unveiled a major semiconductor breakthrough with the introduction of the world’s first sub-1 nanometer (nm) chip technology, featuring a revolutionary transistor architecture at the 0.7 nm, or 7 angstrom node.
